_publications._publicationTitle: Destabilizing NF1 variants act in a dominant negative manner through neurofibromin dimerization.

_contextSnippet: We have overcome this by redesigning the expression vectors to select for cells that remain inducible, perhaps due to their integration in regions of chromatin resistant to epigenetic silencing
details: Overcame previous limitations by redesigning expression vectors to select for cells that remain inducible, likely due to integration in chromatin regions resistant to epigenetic silencing
